title: 6 Candles
overview: Ram and Lizzy lead a happy life with their son Gautham. On the boy's sixth birthday, they take him out to the beach where he goes missing. Ram begins a long hunt for his son, which takes him all over the country and drives him to the depths of despair. Will there be redemption in the end?
